summary: Iteration 21 - Commission Synchronization Testing Complete. Commission synchronization fix verified: Supervisors read from supervisor_policies collection, Agents read from agent_policies collection. Frontend pages display correct commission rates. Responsive design improvements verified on mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test users: supervisor@lotopam.com (10%), lala@gmail.com (13%), agent.marie@lotopam.com (10%)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Commission synchronization is working correctly. All supervisor and vendeur pages display commission rates from their respective policy collections (supervisor_policies, agent_policies). Responsive design tested on mobile (390px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1920px) viewports.

commission_sync_supervisor_13pct.details: Supervisor lala@gmail.com shows 13% commission from supervisor_policies table in /supervisor/my-profile and /supervisor/sales-report endpoints

commission_sync_vendeur_10pct.details: Vendeur agent.marie@lotopam.com shows 10% commission from agent_policies table in /vendeur/profile and /vendeur/dashboard endpoints

vendeur_dashboard_commission_display.details: Dashboard shows 'Commission (10%)' card with correct calculated value

vendeur_mes_ventes_commission_display.details: Mes Ventes page shows 'Commission (10%)' card with correct calculation

supervisor_reports_commission_columns.details: Reports page shows %Agent, Comm. Agent, %Sup, Comm. Sup, B.Final columns

responsive_mobile_390px.details: Vendeur and Supervisor dashboards render correctly on mobile

responsive_tablet_768px.details: All pages render correctly on tablet viewport

supervisor_all_pages.details: Dashboard, Agents, Tickets, Reports pages all functional

api_endpoints_verified: POST /api/auth/login - All roles (supervisor, vendeur) login correctly
GET /api/supervisor/agents - Returns agent commission from agent_policies
notes: Commission synchronization fix verified - rates are read from policy collections not hardcoded
lala@gmail.com supervisor has 13% commission stored in supervisor_policies
agent.marie@lotopam.com has 10% commission stored in agent_policies
All responsive design tests pass with direct navigation (sidebar hidden on mobile)
2 tests fail intermittently due to rate limiting on repeated logins
